zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Carrington Smythe於大約1440年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Sir John William Smythe85歲，母親Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham42歲。他與Elizabeth Smith of Salop結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1485年3月12日在英國英格蘭艾可享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Carrington Smythe于大约1440年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Sir John William Smythe85岁，母亲Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham42岁。他与Elizabeth Smith of Salop结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1485年3月12日在英国英格兰艾可享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Smythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Smith
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name denoting a worker in metal, especially iron, such as a blacksmith or farrier, from Middle English smith ‘smith’ (Old English smith, probably a derivative of smītan ‘to strike, hammer’). Early examples are also found in the Latin form Faber . Metal-working was one of the earliest occupations for which specialist skills were required, and its importance ensured that this term and its equivalents in other languages were the most widespread of all occupational surnames in Europe. Medieval smiths were important not only in making horseshoes, plowshares, and other domestic articles, but above all for their skill in forging swords, other weapons, and armor. This is also the most frequent of all surnames in the US. It is very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below). This surname (in any of the two possible English senses; see also below) is also found in Haiti. See also Smither .

English: from Middle English smithe ‘smithy, forge’ (Old English smiththe). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, occupational, for someone who worked in one, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Smitha in King's Nympton (Devon). Compare Smithey .
Irish and Scottish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac Gobhann, Irish Mac Gabhann ‘son of the smith’. See McGowan .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Carrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, a local name from any of several places in England so named. The one in Gloucestershire is an Old English compound meaning ‘settlement of Beorn's people’. In the Somerset place name the first element is an unattested Old English personal name Bāra, which also occurs, in the genitive form, as the first element of the Cambridgeshire place name. Barrington has also been used as an English form of Gaelic Ó Bearáin.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Carrington Smythe was born about 1440, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John William Smythe, was 85 and his mother, Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham, was 42. He married Elizabeth Smith of Salop. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 12 March 1485, in Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Carrington Smythe est né environ 1440, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John William Smythe, avait 85 ans et sa mère, Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Smith of Salop. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1485, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Carrington Smythe um 1440 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John William Smythe 85 und seine Mutter Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham 42. Er hat Elizabeth Smith of Salop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 12. März 1485 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Carrington Smythe è nato il circa 1440 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John William Smythe, aveva 85 anni e il suo madre, Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Smith of Salop. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 12 marzo 1485, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Carrington Smytheが約1440年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John William Smytheは85歳，母Lady Millicent Elizabeth Lainghamは42歳であった。Elizabeth Smith of Salopと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1485年3月12日にイギリスイギリスエセックスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Carrington Smythe(이)가 대략 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John William Smythe(은)는 85세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Smith of Salop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1485년 3월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Smith of Salop. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1485, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Carrington Smythe родился около 1440 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John William Smythe было 85 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Smith of Salop. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 12 марта 1485 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Carrington Smythe nació aproximadamente 1440, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John William Smythe, tenía 85 años y su mamá, Lady Millicent Elizabeth Laingham, tenía 42 años.
